peer_group_definition: AI-augmented BI for mid-market reference benchmark built from 7 peer companies in the attached Tenacious sample.
prospect_position_summary: Prospect AI maturity is 2/3 against a reference top-quartile benchmark of 2.75. Current visible gap delta is 0.75.
recommended_hook: Orrin Labs has no named AI/ML leadership role. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit per the public team page. Public signals currently point to public news/search pages mention leadership context: perspectives feb 5, 2026 executive function: building systems that can make decisions without you coo jeanne grosser sits down with first round capital's brett berson to unpack what separates good executives from extraordinary ones.

gap_findings.title: Dedicated AI/ML leadership role at the executive level
gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs has no named AI/ML leadership role. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit per the public team page. Public signals currently point to public news/search pages mention leadership context: perspectives feb 5, 2026 executive function: building systems that can make decisions without you coo jeanne grosser sits down with first round capital's brett berson to unpack what separates good executives from extraordinary ones.

gap_findings.title: Dedicated MLOps / ML-platform engineering function (roles open 45+ days suggests active buildout)
gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs has Data Platform Engineer roles open but no explicitly MLOps-labeled roles. The distinction may be deliberate (integrated in data-platform role) or a gap. Current hiring signal: Public careers/search pages surface 113 open roles: Products, Core Platform, Security, Platform Security.

gap_findings.title: Public technical commentary on agentic or evaluation-framework work
gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs blog mentions AI as a priority but has no technical depth posts on agentic workflows or evaluation in the last 12 months. Funding and AI readiness signals currently read as low and score 2/3.
